evals.expected_behavior: Ask for source chain and wallet address before quoting

evals.prompt: bridge 100 USDC from Ethereum to Base, wallet 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc454e4438f44e
evals.expected_behavior: Resolve chains and tokens through LI.FI MCP, convert 100 USDC to smallest units, call get-quote, check allowance, show preview, then return unsigned transactions

evals.prompt: move 1 ETH from Arbitrum to Base and receive USDC, wallet 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc454e4438f44e
evals.expected_behavior: Use get-token for ETH on Arbitrum and USDC on Base, call get-quote, and present a bridge+swap preview

evals.prompt: what is the cheapest bridge for 1000 USDC from Ethereum to Arbitrum, wallet 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc454e4438f44e
evals.expected_behavior: Map user intent to CHEAPEST and either compare routes or request a cheapest quote before previewing the result

evals.prompt: bridge 250 USDC from Ethereum to Base using Across, wallet 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc454e4438f44e
evals.expected_behavior: Call get-tools first to resolve the provider key for Across, then quote with a matching bridge filter

evals.prompt: bridge 50 USDC from Base to Optimism, wallet 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc454e4438f44e
evals.expected_behavior: After quoting, call get-allowance with estimate.approvalAddress and include an approval transaction if allowance is insufficient

evals.prompt: bridge 0.25 ETH from Base to Arbitrum, wallet 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc454e4438f44e
evals.expected_behavior: Skip approval because the source token is native, then return only the main LI.FI action transaction

evals.prompt: check my bridge status, tx 0x1695bded7c1634dce4a200bdec72be0ed6cc5f7153ec2dc832b271d790eb00c8, from ethereum to arbitrum
evals.expected_behavior: Call get-status and explain whether the transfer is pending, completed, partial, refunded, or failed
